## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategic growth initiatives and operational challenges at Okta, focusing on improving sales processes and experimenting with new approaches.](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rachael is prioritizing quick wins and demonstrating impact over scalability in the short term (next 3 months)](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Focus on retail and SaaS verticals for immediate experimentation and results](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Need to develop a way to run independent experiments, potentially with GrowthXLab's assistance](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Current internal processes are slow and inefficient; Rachael seeks workarounds to accelerate progress](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

## Topics

### Current Operational Challenges

  - [High SDR turnover and lack of structured account management](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
  - [Slow internal processes hindering experiment implementation](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Inconsistent adoption of new tools and methodologies across teams](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [Need for cultural shift towards proactive, results-driven approach](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=2735.0)

### Strategic Focus: Retail and SaaS

  - [Retail experiment kicked off last week, but only 15 people added to outreach sequence](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3158.0)
  - [SaaS identified as low-hanging fruit across all business segments](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3392.0)
  - [AE VP ready to engage with SaaS-focused experiment](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3401.0)
  - [Direct mail being considered as part of multi-channel approach](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)

### Metrics and Goals

  - [Primary focus on generating sales meetings and pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Short-term goal (next 3 months): Demonstrate impact and viability of new approaches](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
  - [Not currently prioritizing scale or long-term metrics like ST4 opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3301.0)
  - [Aiming for 10% meeting conversion rate from targeted accounts](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)

### Experimentation and Process Improvement

  - [Exploring options for running independent experiments without full internal dependency](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Considering hiring a growth engineer contractor to support experiment execution](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Evaluating potential for GrowthXLab to assist with workflow triggers and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Developing new templates and briefs to streamline account targeting process](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Team Structure and Culture

  - [Building a "strategic growth experiment team" as potential AI hub within demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Focusing on high-performers ("Nicks") rather than trying to uplift entire SDR organization](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=2500.0)
  - [Emphasizing mindset and cultural change alongside process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=2735.0)
  - [Rachael positioning her team as providing infrastructure and guidelines, with execution owned by individual teams](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=2804.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthXLab to provide async update on new templates and ongoing initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3585.0)
  - [Explore options for running independent experiments, potentially with GrowthXLab's assistance](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [Rachael to send recap of discussion and strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3668.0)
  - [Develop SLA for account scraping requests from other teams](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3611.0)
  - [Continue focus on retail accounts while preparing for SaaS vertical expansion](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)
  - [Evaluate direct mail options, potentially engaging Sendoso for managed services](https://fathom.video/share/EJkrgNcccPHqitm3yRVsNobXLsfEWDef?tab=summary&timestamp=3361.0)
